Container.Name: GPS-Backend trip
Container.Overview: Proof-of-concept Spring Boot GPS tracking backend with REST, WebSocket live updates, in-memory H2 database, and Swagger UI. If you change the container port in Unraid, set SERVER_PORT to the same value.

Config.Name: WebUI
Config.Description: Port mapping for the backend. Host Port can be changed freely. If you change the Container Port, set SERVER_PORT to the same value.

Config.Name: Server Port
Config.Description: Spring Boot listen port inside the container. Keep this equal to the Container Port in the WebUI mapping above.

Config.Name: Spring Profile
Config.Description: Spring profile used inside the container
